title: alnus viridis var. sibirica
intro: Alnus viridis var. sibirica, also known as green alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, Europe, and North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of green alder include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Green alder can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
